name: env-spawner
description: Environment Spawner its a tool to spawn development environments

scripts.build: docker build -t env-spawner . && docker images env-spawner
scripts.build:app: docker build -f Dockerfile-app -t env-spawner-app . && docker images env-spawner-app
scripts.build:firebase: docker build -f Dockerfile-firebase -t env-spawner-firebase . && docker images env-spawner-firebase
scripts.build:server: docker build -f Dockerfile-server -t env-spawner-server . && docker images env-spawner-server

author: Alfredo Vidueira
